games.name: Super Mario World
games.description: Mario's definitive 16-bit adventure across Dinosaur Land. A masterpiece of level design and gameplay mechanics.

games.description: Link's epic journey between the Light and Dark worlds. Defined the action-adventure genre for generations.

games.description: The conclusion of the 2D Metroid saga. Intense atmosphere and precision combat.

games.name: Crash Bandicoot
games.description: Naughty Dog's 3D platforming breakthrough on the Original PlayStation.

games.name: Metal Slug
games.description: The pinnacle of 2D sprite-based run-and-gun combat. Stunning animations and explosive action.

games.description: The absolute king of fighting games. World Warriors clash in the ultimate tournament.

games.description: An timeless RPG classic developed by the 'Dream Team'. Journey across time to save the world.
